title: Add volume support for FreeBSD
body:
Linux and FreeBSD can share almost all the code for this after refactoring the calls to Mount(..., MNT_DETACH) so we can use the similar Mount(..., MNT_FORCE) on FreeBSD.

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```
